title: Carry out post-shearing procedures
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out post-shearing procedures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor weather conditions

pcs.text: Monitor weather during and after shearing operations, and revise work programs in response to changing weather conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor weather during and after shearing operations, and revise work programs in response to changing weather conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor weather during and after shearing operations, and revise work programs in response to changing weather conditions.

pcs.text: Identify adverse weather conditions and assess and report the likely impacts on livestock, feed and property
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify adverse weather conditions and assess and report the likely impacts on livestock, feed and property?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify adverse weather conditions and assess and report the likely impacts on livestock, feed and property.

pcs.text: Determine the appropriate actions required to minimise loss or damage to livestock during adverse weather conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the appropriate actions required to minimise loss or damage to livestock during adverse weather conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the appropriate actions required to minimise loss or damage to livestock during adverse weather conditions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor weather conditions

elements.title: Assess and monitor livestock condition

pcs.text: Assess and record livestock condition and health status
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record livestock condition and health status?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record livestock condition and health status.

pcs.text: Identify and report abnormal behaviour or evidence of sickness
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report abnormal behaviour or evidence of sickness?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report abnormal behaviour or evidence of sickness.

pcs.text: Determine and provide water and feed requirements for livestock, and arrange supplementary feeding as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and provide water and feed requirements for livestock, and arrange supplementary feeding as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and provide water and feed requirements for livestock, and arrange supplementary feeding as required.

pcs.text: Apply workplace animal welfare practices and biosecurity policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply workplace animal welfare practices and biosecurity policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply workplace animal welfare practices and biosecurity policies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess and monitor livestock condition

elements.title: Maintain livestock environment

pcs.text: Maintain livestock yards and facilities so that they are clean, secure and safe
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain livestock yards and facilities so that they are clean, secure and safe?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain livestock yards and facilities so that they are clean, secure and safe.

pcs.text: Maintain suitable shelter for shorn livestock to prevent losses
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain suitable shelter for shorn livestock to prevent losses?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain suitable shelter for shorn livestock to prevent losses.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Maintain livestock environment

elements.title: Complete post-shearing operations

pcs.text: Monitor and control environmental implications associated with shearing activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and control environmental implications associated with shearing activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and control environmental implications associated with shearing activities.

pcs.text: Clean shearing facilities and equipment and dispose of waste according to workplace, work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean shearing facilities and equipment and dispose of waste according to workplace, work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean shearing facilities and equipment and dispose of waste according to workplace, work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Record relevant post-shearing information and report to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record relevant post-shearing information and report to appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record relevant post-shearing information and report to appropriate personnel.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete post-shearing operations

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
